# Jalium.UI 相对 WPF 的 API 差异报告

> 基准：`wpf-main` 的 ref 存根（WindowsBase / PresentationCore / PresentationFramework / System.Xaml，共 1931 个公开类型）。
> 方法：WPF ref 存根解析为权威签名 → 与 Jalium 源码逐类型、逐成员、逐重载对比（成员级由并行 agent 完成，类型级由自动匹配全覆盖）。

## 覆盖范围

成员级（逐成员/重载/参数）已覆盖命名空间：
- `?` / `?`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.IO.Packaging`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Automation`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Automation.Peers`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Diagnostics`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Documents`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Ink`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Input`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Input.StylusPlugIns`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Input.StylusWisp`
- `PresentationCore` / `System.Windows.Interop`

## 汇总

| 类别 | 数量 |
|---|---|
| 缺失类型 | 602 |
| 缺失构造函数 | 225 |
| 缺失属性 | 1604 |
| 缺失方法(逐重载) | 3155 |
| 缺失事件 | 379 |
| 缺失字段(含 DP/RoutedEvent) | 1065 |
| 缺失枚举值 | 128 |
| 参数/签名/可访问性不一致 | 1204 |
| 命名空间错位 | 319 |

## 缺失属性

| 类型 | 属性 | WPF 签名 | 建议 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Application | Properties | `public System.Collections.IDictionary Properties { get; }` | 补充属性(含 DP) |
| Application | ResourceAssembly | `public static System.Reflection.Assembly ResourceAssembly { get; set; }` | 补充属性(含 DP) |

## 缺失事件

| 类型 | 事件 | WPF 签名 | 建议 |
|---|---|---|---|
| Application | Activated | `public event System.EventHandler Activated` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | Deactivated | `public event System.EventHandler Deactivated` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | DispatcherUnhandledException | `public event System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherUnhandledExceptionEventHandler DispatcherUnhandledException` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | FragmentNavigation | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.FragmentNavigationEventHandler FragmentNavigation` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | LoadCompleted | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.LoadCompletedEventHandler LoadCompleted` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | Navigated | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.NavigatedEventHandler Navigated` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | Navigating | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.NavigatingCancelEventHandler Navigating` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | NavigationFailed | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.NavigationFailedEventHandler NavigationFailed` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | NavigationProgress | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.NavigationProgressEventHandler NavigationProgress` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |
| Application | NavigationStopped | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.NavigationStoppedEventHandler NavigationStopped` | 补充路由/CLR 事件 |

## 缺失枚举值

| 枚举 | 缺失值 | 建议 |
|---|---|---|
| AnnotationAction | Removed | 补充枚举成员 |
| AutomationEvents | Notification = 19, ActiveTextPositionChanged = 20 | 补充枚举成员 |
| DataGridLengthUnitType | Auto = 0, Pixel = 1, SizeToCells = 2, SizeToHeader = 3, Star = 4 | 补充枚举成员 |
| InkCanvasEditingMode | GestureOnly = 2, InkAndGesture = 3 | 补充枚举成员 |
| PlacementMode | AbsolutePoint = 5, RelativePoint = 6 | 补充枚举成员 |
| BindingStatus | AsyncRequestPending = 4 | 补充枚举成员 |
| CursorType | ScrollNS, ScrollWE, ArrowCD | 补充枚举成员 |
| Key | Cancel = 1, LineFeed = 4, Clear = 5, Return = 6, Capital = 8, HangulMode = 9, KanaMode = 9, JunjaMode = 10, FinalMode = 11, HanjaMode = 12, KanjiMode = 12, ImeConvert = 14, ImeNonConvert = 15, ImeAccept = 16, ImeModeChange = 17, Prior = 19, Next = 20, Select = 27, Print = 28, Execute = 29, PrintScreen = 30, Snapshot = 30, Help = 33, LWin = 70, RWin = 71, Apps = 72, Sleep = 73, Separator = 86, F13 = 102, F14 = 103, F15 = 104, F16 = 105, F17 = 106, F18 = 107, F19 = 108, F20 = 109, F21 = 110, F22 = 111, F23 = 112, F24 = 113, NumLock = 114, Scroll = 115, LeftShift = 116, RightShift = 117, LeftCtrl = 118, RightCtrl = 119, LeftAlt = 120, RightAlt = 121, BrowserBack = 122, BrowserForward = 123, BrowserRefresh = 124, BrowserStop = 125, BrowserSearch = 126, BrowserFavorites = 127, BrowserHome = 128, VolumeMute = 129, VolumeDown = 130, VolumeUp = 131, MediaNextTrack = 132, MediaPreviousTrack = 133, MediaStop = 134, MediaPlayPause = 135, LaunchMail = 136, SelectMedia = 137, LaunchApplication1 = 138, LaunchApplication2 = 139, Oem1 = 140, Oem2 = 145, Oem3 = 146, AbntC1 = 147, AbntC2 = 148, Oem4 = 149, Oem5 = 150, Oem6 = 151, Oem7 = 152, Oem8 = 153, Oem102 = 154, OemBackslash = 154, ImeProcessed = 155, System = 156, DbeAlphanumeric = 157, OemAttn = 157, DbeKatakana = 158, OemFinish = 158, DbeHiragana = 159, OemCopy = 159, DbeSbcsChar = 160, OemAuto = 160, DbeDbcsChar = 161, OemEnlw = 161, DbeRoman = 162, OemBackTab = 162, Attn = 163, DbeNoRoman = 163, CrSel = 164, DbeEnterWordRegisterMode = 164, DbeEnterImeConfigureMode = 165, ExSel = 165, DbeFlushString = 166, EraseEof = 166, DbeCodeInput = 167, Play = 167, DbeNoCodeInput = 168, Zoom = 168, DbeDetermineString = 169, NoName = 169, DbeEnterDialogConversionMode = 170, Pa1 = 170, OemClear = 171, DeadCharProcessed = 172 | 补充枚举成员 |
| XamlWriterState | Starting = 0, Finished = 1 | 补充枚举成员 |

## 参数 / 签名 / 可访问性不一致

| 类型 | API | 当前(Jalium) | WPF | 差异 | 建议 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Application | Application | `public partial class Application  (no base type, no interface)` | `public partial class Application : System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherObject, System.Windows.Markup.IQueryAmbient` | kind-mismatch | Derive from DispatcherObject and implement IQueryAmbient.IsAmbientPropertyAvailable(string). |
| Application | Exit | `public event System.EventHandler<ExitEventArgs>? Exit` | `public event System.Windows.ExitEventHandler Exit` | return-type | Introduce the WPF ExitEventHandler delegate and type the event with it. |
| Application | SessionEnding | `public event System.EventHandler<SessionEndingCancelEventArgs>? SessionEnding` | `public event System.Windows.SessionEndingCancelEventHandler SessionEnding` | return-type | Introduce SessionEndingCancelEventHandler delegate. |
| Application | Startup | `public event System.EventHandler<StartupEventArgs>? Startup` | `public event System.Windows.StartupEventHandler Startup` | return-type | Introduce StartupEventHandler delegate. |
| Clipboard | Clear | `public static bool Clear()` | `public static void Clear()` | return-type | WPF's Clear returns void; change the Jalium return type from bool to void to match the API surface. |
| Clipboard | GetDataObject | `public static ClipboardDataObject GetDataObject()` | `public static System.Windows.IDataObject? GetDataObject()` | return-type | Return the nullable IDataObject? interface (Jalium.UI.Controls.IDataObject) rather than the concrete ClipboardDataObject to match WPF's signature and null-return semantics. |
| Clipboard | GetFileDropList | `public static string[]? GetFileDropList()` | `public static System.Collections.Specialized.StringCollection GetFileDropList()` | return-type | Return a non-null System.Collections.Specialized.StringCollection (empty when no files) instead of a nullable string[]. |
| Clipboard | GetImage | `public static (int Width, int Height, int Stride, byte[] Data)? GetImage()` | `public static System.Windows.Media.Imaging.BitmapSource? GetImage()` | return-type | Return the Jalium BitmapSource equivalent (Jalium.UI.Media.Imaging.BitmapSource?) instead of a raw pixel tuple to match WPF. |
| Clipboard | GetText | `public static string? GetText()` | `public static string GetText()` | return-type | Return non-nullable string (return string.Empty when the clipboard has no text) to match WPF's GetText contract. |
| Clipboard | SetDataObject | `public static void SetDataObject(object data, bool copy = true)` | `public static void SetDataObject(object data, bool copy)` | default-value | WPF exposes two distinct overloads - SetDataObject(object data) and SetDataObject(object data, bool copy) with NO default. Remove the copy=true default and add a separate single-argument SetDataObject(object data) overload to reproduce WPF's overload set (a defaulted parameter is not reflection-equivalent to the two-overload shape). |
| Clipboard | SetFileDropList | `public static bool SetFileDropList(string[] files)` | `public static void SetFileDropList(System.Collections.Specialized.StringCollection fileDropList)` | param-type | Change the parameter type from string[] to System.Collections.Specialized.StringCollection and the return type from bool to void to match WPF. |
| Clipboard | SetText | `public static bool SetText(string? text)` | `public static void SetText(string text)` | return-type | Return void (WPF's SetText returns void) and take a non-nullable string parameter. |
| ComponentResourceKey | ComponentResourceKey(Type, object) | `public ComponentResourceKey(Type typeInTargetAssembly, string resourceId)` | `public ComponentResourceKey(System.Type typeInTargetAssembly, object resourceId)` | param-type | Widen resourceId parameter to object. |
| ComponentResourceKey | ResourceId | `public string ResourceId { get; }` | `public object ResourceId { get; set; }` | return-type | Type ResourceId as object and add a setter. |
| ComponentResourceKey | TypeInTargetAssembly | `public Type TypeInTargetAssembly { get; }` | `public System.Type TypeInTargetAssembly { get; set; }` | accessibility | Add a setter (WPF property is get/set). |
| ComponentResourceKey | ComponentResourceKey | `public sealed class ComponentResourceKey  (no base)` | `public partial class ComponentResourceKey : System.Windows.ResourceKey` | kind-mismatch | Derive from ResourceKey which supplies the Assembly override. |
| CornerRadius | TopLeft | `public double TopLeft { get; }` | `public double TopLeft { get; set; }` | accessibility | WPF CornerRadius is a mutable struct; add setter. |
| CornerRadius | TopRight | `public double TopRight { get; }` | `public double TopRight { get; set; }` | accessibility | Add setter. |
| CornerRadius | BottomRight | `public double BottomRight { get; }` | `public double BottomRight { get; set; }` | accessibility | Add setter. |
| CornerRadius | BottomLeft | `public double BottomLeft { get; }` | `public double BottomLeft { get; set; }` | accessibility | Add setter. |
| CornerRadiusConverter | CornerRadiusConverter | `public sealed class CornerRadiusConverter : Jalium.UI.Markup.TypeConverter` | `public partial class CornerRadiusConverter : System.ComponentModel.TypeConverter` | kind-mismatch | Jalium uses a bespoke minimal TypeConverter base; none of the ITypeDescriptorContext/CultureInfo WPF overloads exist. |
| DataTemplate | DataTemplate(object) | `public DataTemplate(Type dataType)` | `public DataTemplate(object dataType)` | param-type | Accept object dataType (WPF allows a type or a data-type key). |
| DataTemplate | DataType | `public Type? DataType { get; set; }` | `public object DataType { get; set; }` | return-type | Type DataType as object. |
| DataTemplate | Triggers | `public IList<TriggerBase> Triggers { get; }` | `public System.Windows.TriggerCollection Triggers { get; }` | return-type | Expose a TriggerCollection. |
| DataTemplate | DataTemplate | `public class DataTemplate  (no base)` | `public partial class DataTemplate : System.Windows.FrameworkTemplate` | kind-mismatch | Derive from FrameworkTemplate. |
| DataTemplateKey | DataTemplateKey(object) | `public DataTemplateKey(Type dataType)` | `public DataTemplateKey(object dataType)` | param-type | Accept object dataType. |
| DataTemplateKey | DataTemplateKey | `public sealed class DataTemplateKey : IEquatable<DataTemplateKey>` | `public partial class DataTemplateKey : System.Windows.TemplateKey` | kind-mismatch | Derive from TemplateKey rather than re-implementing IEquatable. |
| DataTrigger | Binding | `public Binding? Binding { get; set; }` | `public System.Windows.Data.BindingBase Binding { get; set; }` | return-type | Type Binding as BindingBase to allow MultiBinding/PriorityBinding. |
| DataTrigger | Setters | `public IList<Setter> Setters { get; }  (inherited from Jalium TriggerBase)` | `public System.Windows.SetterBaseCollection Setters { get; }` | return-type | Expose a SetterBaseCollection. |
| DpiChangedEventArgs | DpiChangedEventArgs | `public sealed class DpiChangedEventArgs : System.EventArgs` | `public sealed class DpiChangedEventArgs : System.Windows.RoutedEventArgs` | kind-mismatch | Re-base on RoutedEventArgs (not System.EventArgs) so it carries the routed-event surface (RoutedEvent, Source, OriginalSource, Handled) and can be raised via RaiseEvent. |
| DragDropEffects | All | `All = Copy \| Move \| Link \| Scroll  (= 0x80000007 = -2147483641)` | `All = -2147483645` | default-value | WPF's All = 0x80000003 (Scroll \| Copy \| Move) and intentionally EXCLUDES Link. Redefine Jalium as `All = Copy \| Move \| Scroll` so the value equals -2147483645. |
| DragEventArgs | InvokeEventHandler | `internal override void InvokeEventHandler(Delegate handler, object target)` | `protected override void InvokeEventHandler(System.Delegate genericHandler, object genericTarget)` | accessibility | Change Jalium override from 'internal' to 'protected' to match WPF's protected surface. |
| EventSetter | EventSetter | `public sealed class EventSetter  (no base)` | `public partial class EventSetter : System.Windows.SetterBase` | kind-mismatch | Derive from SetterBase for full parity with Style.Setters collections. |
| EventTrigger | Actions | `public IList<TriggerAction> Actions { get; }` | `public System.Windows.TriggerActionCollection Actions { get; }` | return-type | Expose a TriggerActionCollection. |
| FigureLength | FigureLength(double) | `public FigureLength(double value) : this(value, FigureUnitType.Auto)` | `public FigureLength(double pixels)  // creates FigureUnitType.Pixel` | default-value | Single-argument ctor should default the unit type to Pixel (WPF semantics), not Auto. |
| FrameworkElement | MoveFocus | `public bool MoveFocus(FocusNavigationDirection direction) [on UIElement]` | `public sealed override bool MoveFocus(System.Windows.Input.TraversalRequest request)` | param-type | WPF takes a TraversalRequest object, not a bare direction enum; add TraversalRequest and a MoveFocus(TraversalRequest) overload. |
| FrameworkElement | RegisterName | `public void RegisterName(string name, FrameworkElement element)` | `public void RegisterName(string name, object scopedElement)` | param-type | Widen 2nd parameter from FrameworkElement to object (INameScope registration accepts any object). |
| FrameworkElement | GetBindingExpression | `public BindingExpressionBase? GetBindingExpression(DependencyProperty dp) [on DependencyObject]` | `public System.Windows.Data.BindingExpression GetBindingExpression(System.Windows.DependencyProperty dp)` | return-type | WPF returns the concrete BindingExpression, not BindingExpressionBase. |
| FrameworkElement | TemplatedParent | `public FrameworkElement? TemplatedParent { get; }` | `public System.Windows.DependencyObject TemplatedParent { get; }` | return-type | Widen return type from FrameworkElement to DependencyObject. |
| FrameworkElement | ContextMenu | `public object? ContextMenu { get; set; }` | `public System.Windows.Controls.ContextMenu ContextMenu { get; set; }` | return-type | Typed as object because ContextMenu lives in Controls and FrameworkElement is in Core; intentional but breaks strong-typed parity. |
| FrameworkElement | ArrangeCore | `protected override Size ArrangeCore(Rect finalRect)` | `protected sealed override void ArrangeCore(System.Windows.Rect finalRect)` | return-type | WPF ArrangeCore returns void and is sealed; Jalium returns Size and is overridable (layout-engine divergence). |
| FrameworkElement | OnVisualParentChanged | `protected override void OnVisualParentChanged(Visual? oldParent)` | `protected internal override void OnVisualParentChanged(System.Windows.DependencyObject oldParent)` | param-type | WPF parameter is DependencyObject and method is protected internal; Jalium uses Visual? and protected. |
| FrameworkElement | GetLayoutClip | `internal virtual Geometry? GetLayoutClip() [on UIElement, no param]` | `protected override System.Windows.Media.Geometry GetLayoutClip(System.Windows.Size layoutSlotSize)` | param-count | WPF passes layoutSlotSize and the method is protected; Jalium's is parameterless and internal. |

| UIElement3D | IsVisible | `public bool IsVisible { get; set; }` | `public bool IsVisible { get; }` | accessibility | WPF IsVisible is read-only (computed from the visual tree, backed by a read-only DP). Jalium exposes a public setter. Make it read-only (public getter, internal/private setter) to match WPF's public surface. |
| UIElement3D | InvalidateModel | `protected void InvalidateModel()` | `public void InvalidateModel()` | accessibility | Change accessibility from protected to public to match WPF. |
| Vector | X | `public double X { get; }  // readonly struct, no setter` | `public double X { get; set; }` | accessibility | WPF Vector is mutable; Jalium is a readonly struct. Add settable X for parity. |
| Vector | Y | `public double Y { get; }  // readonly struct, no setter` | `public double Y { get; set; }` | accessibility | Add settable Y for parity. |

| VectorConverter | CanConvertFrom | `public virtual bool CanConvertFrom(Type sourceType)  // inherited` | `public override bool CanConvertFrom(System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, System.Type sourceType)` | param-count | Add the ITypeDescriptorContext-qualified overload for parity. |
| VectorConverter | ConvertFrom | `public override object? ConvertFrom(object? value)` | `public override object ConvertFrom(System.ComponentModel.ITypeDescriptorContext context, System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture, object value)` | param-count | WPF passes context+culture+value; Jalium passes only value. |
| Visibility | Visibility | `public enum Visibility  (int underlying type)` | `public enum Visibility : byte` | kind-mismatch | Declare as `public enum Visibility : byte` to match WPF's underlying type (affects sizeof/marshalling parity). |

Storyboard { get; set; }` | `public System.Windows.Media.Animation.Storyboard Storyboard { get; set; }` | return-type | WPF types Storyboard as Media.Animation.Storyboard; Jalium uses an IStoryboard abstraction. Align the property type for parity. |
| VisualState | VisualState (type) | `public sealed class VisualState (base: object)` | `public partial class VisualState : System.Windows.DependencyObject` | kind-mismatch | Re-base on DependencyObject. |
| VisualStateGroup | VisualStateGroup.States | `public IList<VisualState> States { get; }` | `public System.Collections.IList States { get; }` | return-type | WPF exposes non-generic IList; Jalium exposes IList<VisualState>. Minor; align if strict parity is required. |
| VisualStateGroup | VisualStateGroup.Transitions | `public IList<VisualTransition> Transitions { get; }` | `public System.Collections.IList Transitions { get; }` | return-type | WPF exposes non-generic IList; Jalium exposes IList<VisualTransition>. |

| ContextMenu | ContextMenu (base class) | `public class ContextMenu : ItemsControl` | `public partial class ContextMenu : System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.MenuBase` | kind-mismatch | WPF ContextMenu derives from Primitives.MenuBase (ItemsControl subclass adding menu-mode/keyboard nav). | DataGridTextColumn | CommitCellEdit | `public override void CommitCellEdit(FrameworkElement editingElement, object dataItem)` | `protected override bool CommitCellEdit(System.Windows.FrameworkElement editingElement)` | param-count | WPF takes only editingElement and returns bool (success); Jalium adds a dataItem param and returns void. Reconcile to WPF's single-param bool-returning contract. |
| DataGridTextColumn | GenerateElement | `public override FrameworkElement GenerateElement(DataGridCell cell, object dataItem)` | `protected override System.Windows.FrameworkElement GenerateElement(System.Windows.Controls.DataGridCell cell, object dataItem)` | accessibility | WPF protected; Jalium public (base declares public virtual). |
| DataGridTextColumn | GenerateEditingElement | `public override FrameworkElement? GenerateEditingElement(DataGridCell cell, object dataItem)` | `protected override System.Windows.FrameworkElement GenerateEditingElement(System.Windows.Controls.DataGridCell cell, object dataItem)` | accessibility | WPF protected; Jalium public + nullable return. |
| DataGridTextColumn | CancelCellEdit | `public override void CancelCellEdit(FrameworkElement editingElement, object dataItem)` | `protected override void CancelCellEdit(System.Windows.FrameworkElement editingElement, object uneditedValue)` | accessibility | WPF protected with 'uneditedValue' (prior value); Jalium public with 'dataItem' (row item). Accessibility and param semantics differ. |
| DatePickerFormat | Long | `Long = 1` | `Long = 0` | default-value | Swap declaration order to Long=0, Short=1 to match WPF. |
| DatePickerFormat | Short | `Short = 0` | `Short = 1` | default-value | Swap declaration order to Long=0, Short=1 to match WPF. |
| Decorator | VisualChildrenCount | `public override int VisualChildrenCount { get; }` | `protected override int VisualChildrenCount { get; }` | accessibility | WPF protected; Jalium's Visual base declares it public, so the override is public. Framework-wide divergence. |
| Decorator | GetVisualChild | `public override Visual? GetVisualChild(int index)` | `protected override System.Windows.Media.Visual GetVisualChild(int index)` | accessibility | WPF protected; Jalium public + nullable return (driven by Jalium Visual base). |
| DefinitionBase | DefinitionBase | `public abstract class DefinitionBase : DependencyObject` | `public abstract class DefinitionBase : System.Windows.FrameworkContentElement` | kind-mismatch | WPF's DefinitionBase derives from FrameworkContentElement (resource lookup, binding, name-scope, data context); Jalium's derives directly from DependencyObject, losing that inherited surface on ColumnDefinition/RowDefinition. |
| Dock | Left | `Left = 2` | `Left = 0` | default-value | Reorder to Left=0, Top=1, Right=2, Bottom=3 to match System.Windows.Controls.Dock. |
| Dock | Top | `Top = 0` | `Top = 1` | default-value | Reorder to Left=0, Top=1, Right=2, Bottom=3 to match System.Windows.Controls.Dock. |
| Dock | Right | `Right = 3` | `Right = 2` | default-value | Reorder to Left=0, Top=1, Right=2, Bottom=3 to match System.Windows.Controls.Dock. |
| Dock | Bottom | `Bottom = 1` | `Bottom = 3` | default-value | Reorder to Left=0, Top=1, Right=2, Bottom=3 to match System.Windows.Controls.Dock. |
| DocumentViewer | Find | `public void Find(string text, bool matchCase = false, bool matchWholeWord = false)` | `public void Find()` | param-count | WPF's Find() opens the find toolbar (no args); Jalium's performs a parameterized search. Add a parameterless Find() overload to match WPF. |
| Expander | Expander | `public class Expander : ContentControl` | `public class Expander : System.Windows.Controls.HeaderedContentControl` | kind-mismatch | WPF Expander derives from HeaderedContentControl; Jalium derives from ContentControl and re-declares its own Header DP. HeaderedContentControl exists in Jalium (TabControl.cs) — re-base to inherit Header/HeaderTemplate/HeaderTemplateSelector/HasHeader instead of losing HeaderTemplate/HeaderTemplateSelector/HasHeader. |
| FlowDocumentPageViewer | OnDocumentChanged | `protected void OnDocumentChanged(FlowDocument? oldDocument, FlowDocument? newDocument)` | `protected override void OnDocumentChanged()` | param-count | WPF's parameterless override hook (from DocumentViewerBase) is absent; Jalium's OnDocumentChanged is its own DP-change handler taking two FlowDocument params. Provide the parameterless protected override for parity. |
| FlowDocumentReader | Find | `public bool Find(string searchText)` | `public void Find()` | param-count | Add the WPF parameterless Find() overload (invokes the reader's Find UI). Jalium's bool Find(string) is a non-WPF text-search extra and does not satisfy the WPF signature. |
| FlowDocumentReader | Selection | `public Jalium.UI.Controls.TextSelection? Selection { get; private set; }` | `public System.Windows.Documents.TextSelection Selection { get; }` | return-type | WPF returns System.Windows.Documents.TextSelection; Jalium returns a minimal custom Jalium.UI.Controls.TextSelection. Align onto the documents TextSelection type (Jalium.UI.Documents). |
| FlowDocumentScrollViewer | Find | `public bool Find(string searchText)` | `public void Find()` | param-count | Add the WPF parameterless Find() overload. Jalium's bool Find(string) is a non-WPF text-search extra. |
| FlowDocumentScrollViewer | Selection | `public Jalium.UI.Controls.TextSelection? Selection { get; private set; }` | `public System.Windows.Documents.TextSelection Selection { get; }` | return-type | Align the returned selection onto System.Windows.Documents.TextSelection (Jalium.UI.Documents) instead of the minimal custom Jalium.UI.Controls.TextSelection. |
| Frame | GoBack | `public bool GoBack()` | `public void GoBack()` | return-type | WPF GoBack() returns void; Jalium returns bool. Align return type to void. |
| Frame | GoForward | `public bool GoForward()` | `public void GoForward()` | return-type | WPF GoForward() returns void; Jalium returns bool. Align return type to void. |
| Frame | Navigated | `public event System.EventHandler<NavigationEventArgs>? Navigated` | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.NavigatedEventHandler Navigated` | param-type | WPF uses the NavigatedEventHandler delegate (System.Windows.Navigation); Jalium uses EventHandler<NavigationEventArgs>. Introduce/expose NavigatedEventHandler for parity. |
| Frame | Navigating | `public event System.EventHandler<NavigatingCancelEventArgs>? Navigating` | `public event System.Windows.Navigation.NavigatingCancelEventHandler Navigating` | param-type | WPF uses NavigatingCancelEventHandler; Jalium uses EventHandler<NavigatingCancelEventArgs>. Introduce/expose NavigatingCancelEventHandler for parity. |
| Grid | ColumnDefinitions | `public ColumnDefinitionCollection ColumnDefinitions { get; }` | `public System.Windows.Controls.ColumnDefinitionCollection ColumnDefinitions { get; set; }` | accessibility | WPF ref exposes a public setter on ColumnDefinitions; Jalium's is read-only (get-only, initialized inline). Add a public setter for parity. |
| Grid | RowDefinitions | `public RowDefinitionCollection RowDefinitions { get; }` | `public System.Windows.Controls.RowDefinitionCollection RowDefinitions { get; set; }` | accessibility | WPF ref exposes a public setter on RowDefinitions; Jalium's is read-only. Add a public setter for parity. |
| GridResizeBehavior | CurrentAndNext | `CurrentAndNext = 2` | `CurrentAndNext = 1` | default-value | Reorder to BasedOnAlignment=0, CurrentAndNext=1, PreviousAndCurrent=2, PreviousAndNext=3 to match WPF. |
| GridResizeBehavior | PreviousAndCurrent | `PreviousAndCurrent = 1` | `PreviousAndCurrent = 2` | default-value | Reorder to BasedOnAlignment=0, CurrentAndNext=1, PreviousAndCurrent=2, PreviousAndNext=3 to match WPF. |
| GridSplitter | GridSplitter | `public class GridSplitter : Control` | `public class GridSplitter : System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.Thumb` | kind-mismatch | WPF GridSplitter derives from Primitives.Thumb; Jalium derives from Control and hand-rolls drag handling (AddHandler + private handlers + OnLostMouseCapture). Jalium.UI.Controls.Primitives.Thumb EXISTS - re-parent onto it to inherit the Thumb drag surface (DragStartedEvent/DragDeltaEvent/DragCompletedEvent, IsDragging, CancelDrag()) for parity. |
| GridView | GridView | `public sealed class GridView : ViewBase` | `public class GridView : ViewBase, System.Windows.Markup.IAddChild (unsealed)` | kind-mismatch | Unseal and implement IAddChild (AddChild/AddText); IAddChild exists in Jalium. Sealed currently prevents the protected-virtual AddChild/AddText overloads WPF exposes. |
| GridViewColumn | GridViewColumn | `public sealed class GridViewColumn : DependencyObject` | `public class GridViewColumn : DependencyObject, System.ComponentModel.INotifyPropertyChanged (unsealed)` | kind-mismatch | Implement INotifyPropertyChanged and unseal so OnPropertyChanged/OnHeaderStringFormatChanged hooks and PropertyChanged notification (WPF raises it for Width/ActualWidth) can exist. |
| GridViewColumn | GridViewColumn.DisplayMemberBinding | `public BindingBase? DisplayMemberBinding backed by DisplayMemberBindingProperty DependencyProperty` | `public System.Windows.Data.BindingBase DisplayMemberBinding { get; set; } (plain CLR property, not DP-backed)` | kind-mismatch | WPF deliberately does NOT back DisplayMemberBinding with a DependencyProperty; Jalium added DisplayMemberBindingProperty (extra DP field not in WPF). Minor additive deviation. |
| GridViewColumnHeader | GridViewColumnHeader | `public class GridViewColumnHeader : ContentControl` | `public class GridViewColumnHeader : System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.ButtonBase` | kind-mismatch | Reparent to ButtonBase (exists at Jalium.UI.Controls.Primitives.ButtonBase). WPF drives column sorting via the inherited Click/OnClick; ContentControl base drops the entire ButtonBase surface (Click, Command, CommandParameter, ClickMode, IsPressed + DP fields, OnClick). |
| GridViewColumnHeader | GridViewColumnHeader.Role | `public GridViewColumnHeaderRole Role { get; internal set; } (plain CLR auto-property)` | `public GridViewColumnHeaderRole Role { get; } (read-only, backed by RoleProperty DP)` | kind-mismatch | Back Role with a read-only RoleProperty DependencyProperty to match WPF. |
| GridViewHeaderRowPresenter | GridViewHeaderRowPresenter | `public class GridViewHeaderRowPresenter : FrameworkElement` | `public class GridViewHeaderRowPresenter : System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.GridViewRowPresenterBase` | kind-mismatch | Derive from GridViewRowPresenterBase (exists in Jalium.UI.Controls.Primitives) to inherit the public Columns DP; Jalium resolves columns via a private VisualParent walk, so no public Columns property is exposed. |
| GridViewRowPresenter | GridViewRowPresenter | `public class GridViewRowPresenter : FrameworkElement` | `public class GridViewRowPresenter : System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.GridViewRowPresenterBase` | kind-mismatch | Derive from GridViewRowPresenterBase to inherit the public Columns DP; columns are currently fetched via a private VisualParent walk with no public Columns property. |
| GroupBox | GroupBox | `public class GroupBox : ContentControl` | `public class GroupBox : System.Windows.Controls.HeaderedContentControl` | kind-mismatch | Derive from HeaderedContentControl (exists in Jalium.UI.Controls) so Header/HeaderStringFormat/HeaderTemplate/HeaderTemplateSelector/HasHeader are inherited. | GroupItem | GroupItem | `public class GroupItem : ContentControl` | `public class GroupItem : ContentControl, IContainItemStorage, IHierarchicalVirtualizationAndScrollInfo` | kind-mismatch | Implement IContainItemStorage and IHierarchicalVirtualizationAndScrollInfo (both defined in Jalium.UI.Controls/VirtualizationInfrastructure.cs) so hierarchical virtualization and per-item storage work; also override ArrangeOverride/OnApplyTemplate for header+items sizing as WPF does. |
| GroupStyle | GroupStyle | `public sealed class GroupStyle` | `public class GroupStyle : System.ComponentModel.INotifyPropertyChanged (unsealed)` | kind-mismatch | Implement INotifyPropertyChanged and unseal — the protected-virtual PropertyChanged event and OnPropertyChanged method cannot be added while sealed. |
| Image | Image | `public class Image : Control, IReclaimableResource` | `public class Image : System.Windows.FrameworkElement, System.Windows.Markup.IUriContext` | kind-mismatch | WPF's Image derives directly from FrameworkElement and implements IUriContext (pack-URI base resolution). Jalium derives from Control (adding non-WPF templating surface: Template/Background/BorderBrush/Padding/etc.) and implements IReclaimableResource instead. Implement IUriContext (BaseUri); the added Control surface is an additive deviation. |

| InkCanvasEditingMode | EraseByStroke | `EraseByStroke = 4` | `EraseByStroke = 6` | default-value | Insert GestureOnly=2 and InkAndGesture=3 after Ink, shifting Select=4, EraseByPoint=5, EraseByStroke=6 to match WPF. |

| InkCanvasSelectionHitResult | TopRight | `TopRight = 6` | `TopRight = 3` | default-value | Reorder to None=0, TopLeft=1, Top=2, TopRight=3, Right=4, BottomRight=5, Bottom=6, BottomLeft=7, Left=8, Selection=9 to match WPF. |
| InkCanvasSelectionHitResult | BottomRight | `BottomRight = 8` | `BottomRight = 5` | default-value | Reorder to None=0, TopLeft=1, Top=2, TopRight=3, Right=4, BottomRight=5, Bottom=6, BottomLeft=7, Left=8, Selection=9 to match WPF. |
| InkCanvasSelectionHitResult | Bottom | `Bottom = 2` | `Bottom = 6` | default-value | Reorder to None=0, TopLeft=1, Top=2, TopRight=3, Right=4, BottomRight=5, Bottom=6, BottomLeft=7, Left=8, Selection=9 to match WPF. |
| InkCanvasSelectionHitResult | Left | `Left = 3` | `Left = 8` | default-value | Reorder to None=0, TopLeft=1, Top=2, TopRight=3, Right=4, BottomRight=5, Bottom=6, BottomLeft=7, Left=8, Selection=9 to match WPF. |
| InkPresenter | VisualChildrenCount | `public override int VisualChildrenCount { get; }` | `protected override int VisualChildrenCount { get; }` | accessibility | WPF's is protected; Jalium's is public because the base Jalium.UI.Media.Visual declares VisualChildrenCount as 'public virtual' (framework-wide widening). Not fixable at InkPresenter level. |
| InkPresenter | GetVisualChild | `public override Visual? GetVisualChild(int index)` | `protected override System.Windows.Media.Visual GetVisualChild(int index)` | accessibility | WPF's is protected; Jalium's is public (base Visual.GetVisualChild is 'public virtual'). Framework-wide difference. |
| ItemCollection | Add | `public void Add(object item)` | `public int Add(object newItem)` | return-type | WPF's ItemCollection.Add returns the insertion index (int); Jalium's returns void. Change return type to int. |
| ItemCollection | Remove | `public bool Remove(object item)` | `public void Remove(object removeItem)` | return-type | WPF returns void; Jalium returns bool (ICollection<object>.Remove). Reconcile if strict parity required. |
| ItemCollection | CopyTo | `public void CopyTo(object[] array, int arrayIndex)` | `public void CopyTo(System.Array array, int index)` | param-type | WPF exposes non-generic ICollection.CopyTo(Array,int); Jalium exposes generic CopyTo(object[],int). Add the non-generic overload. |
| ItemCollection | GetEnumerator | `public IEnumerator<object> GetEnumerator()` | `protected override System.Collections.IEnumerator GetEnumerator()` | return-type | WPF's is a protected override returning non-generic IEnumerator; Jalium exposes a public generic IEnumerator<object>. Return-type and accessibility both differ. |
| ItemContainerTemplateSelector | ItemContainerTemplateSelector | `public sealed class ItemContainerTemplateSelector { /* implicit public ctor */ }` | `public abstract partial class ItemContainerTemplateSelector { protected ItemContainerTemplateSelector() { } }` | kind-mismatch | WPF makes this an ABSTRACT base class (protected ctor) designed to be subclassed; Jalium made it sealed+concrete with an implicit public ctor. Change to `public abstract class` with a `protected` parameterless ctor. |
| ItemContainerTemplateSelector | SelectTemplate | `public DataTemplate? SelectTemplate(System.Type itemType, Jalium.UI.Controls.ItemsControl parentItemsControl)` | `public virtual System.Windows.DataTemplate SelectTemplate(object item, System.Windows.Controls.ItemsControl parentItemsControl)` | param-type | First parameter should be the data item (object item), not its Type (Type itemType); and the method must be virtual (currently non-virtual because the class is sealed). Make the class abstract and the method virtual, change param to object item. |
| ItemsControl | IsItemItsOwnContainer | `protected virtual bool IsItemItsOwnContainer(object item)` | `public bool IsItemItsOwnContainer(object item)` | accessibility | WPF exposes a PUBLIC non-virtual IsItemItsOwnContainer(object) that delegates to protected virtual IsItemItsOwnContainerOverride(object). Jalium only has a protected virtual method named IsItemItsOwnContainer. Add the public wrapper and split out the Override hook. |

MediaFailed` | `public event System.EventHandler<System.Windows.ExceptionRoutedEventArgs> MediaFailed` | param-type | WPF raises MediaFailed with ExceptionRoutedEventArgs; Jalium uses a bespoke MediaFailedEventArgs. Introduce/align on an ExceptionRoutedEventArgs-equivalent for parity. |
| MediaElement | MediaElement | `public event EventHandler<MediaScriptCommandEventArgs>? ScriptCommand` | `public event System.EventHandler<System.Windows.MediaScriptCommandRoutedEventArgs> ScriptCommand` | param-type | WPF ScriptCommand uses MediaScriptCommandRoutedEventArgs; Jalium uses MediaScriptCommandEventArgs (non-routed). Align arg type for parity. |
| MediaState | Close | `Close = 4` | `Close = 2` | default-value | Reorder to Manual=0, Play=1, Close=2, Pause=3, Stop=4 to match WPF. |
| MediaState | Pause | `Pause = 2` | `Pause = 3` | default-value | Reorder to Manual=0, Play=1, Close=2, Pause=3, Stop=4 to match WPF. |
| MediaState | Stop | `Stop = 3` | `Stop = 4` | default-value | Reorder to Manual=0, Play=1, Close=2, Pause=3, Stop=4 to match WPF. |
| MenuItem | MenuItem.OnClick | `protected void OnClick()` | `protected virtual void OnClick()` | kind-mismatch | WPF OnClick is virtual (subclass extension point); Jalium OnClick is non-virtual. Mark it virtual for parity. |

| PrintDialog | MinPage | `public int MinPage { get; set; }` | `public uint MinPage { get; set; }` | return-type | WPF property type is uint; Jalium uses int. Change to uint for parity. |
| PrintDialog | MaxPage | `public int MaxPage { get; set; }` | `public uint MaxPage { get; set; }` | return-type | WPF property type is uint; Jalium uses int. Change to uint for parity. |
| PrintDialog | ShowDialog | `public bool ShowDialog()` | `public bool? ShowDialog()` | return-type | WPF returns Nullable<bool> (null when dismissed without a decision); Jalium returns non-nullable bool. Change return type to bool? for parity. |
| RichTextBox | Selection | `public TextRange Selection { get; }` | `public System.Windows.Documents.TextSelection Selection { get; }` | return-type | WPF returns TextSelection (derives from TextRange, adds caret/formatting API); Jalium returns the plain TextRange base. Return TextSelection for parity. |
| RowDefinitionCollectionConverter | RowDefinitionCollectionConverter | `public sealed class RowDefinitionCollectionConverter : Jalium.UI.Markup.TypeConverter` | `internal partial class RowDefinitionCollectionConverter : System.ComponentModel.TypeConverter` | kind-mismatch | WPF type is INTERNAL (not public API); Jalium exposes a public converter in Jalium.UI.Markup deriving from Jalium's own TypeConverter abstraction, not System.ComponentModel.TypeConverter. | RowDefinitionCollectionConverter | ConvertFrom | `public override object? The 3-arg (context, culture, value) form does not exist; functional string->RowDefinitionCollection conversion is provided by ConvertFrom(object?). |
| ScrollViewer | InvalidateScrollInfo | `internal void InvalidateScrollInfo()` | `public void InvalidateScrollInfo()` | accessibility | Promote InvalidateScrollInfo to public — IScrollInfo content implementations call it to notify the owning ScrollViewer of extent/offset changes. |
| SelectedCellsChangedEventArgs | .ctor | `SelectedCellsChangedEventArgs(IList<DataGridCellInfo> addedCells, IList<DataGridCellInfo> removedCells)` | `SelectedCellsChangedEventArgs(System.Collections.Generic.List<DataGridCellInfo> addedCells, System.Collections.Generic.List<DataGridCellInfo> removedCells); SelectedCellsChangedEventArgs(System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection<DataGridCellInfo> addedCells, System.Collections.ObjectModel.ReadOnlyCollection<DataGridCellInfo> removedCells)` | param-type | Jalium collapsed WPF's two concrete ctor overloads (List<> and ReadOnlyCollection<>) into a single IList<> overload, which is source-compatible with both WPF call sites; strict overload-set parity would require adding the two concrete overloads. |
| SelectedDatesCollection | .ctor | `internal SelectedDatesCollection(Calendar owner)` | `public SelectedDatesCollection(System.Windows.Controls.Calendar owner)` | accessibility | WPF exposes the (Calendar owner) constructor as public; Jalium's is internal. Promote to public for API parity. |

IList<object> is NOT assignable to System.Collections.IList, so `IList a = e.AddedItems;` fails to compile against Jalium. |
| SelectionChangedEventArgs | RemovedItems | `public IList<object> RemovedItems { get; }` | `public System.Collections.IList RemovedItems { get; }` | return-type | Use non-generic System.Collections.IList to match WPF (same generic-vs-nongeneric incompatibility as AddedItems). |
| SelectionChangedEventArgs | .ctor | `SelectionChangedEventArgs(RoutedEvent routedEvent, IList<object> removedItems, IList<object> addedItems)` | `SelectionChangedEventArgs(System.Windows.RoutedEvent id, System.Collections.IList removedItems, System.Collections.IList addedItems)` | param-type | Change parameter types from IList<object> to non-generic System.Collections.IList; parameter order already matches WPF (removedItems then addedItems). |
| Slider | OnValueChanged | `protected void OnValueChanged(double oldValue, double newValue)` | `protected override void OnValueChanged(double oldValue, double newValue)` | kind-mismatch | In WPF this overrides RangeBase.OnValueChanged; Jalium's is a plain non-virtual method (base is Control) that subclasses cannot override and no RangeBase pipeline invokes. Re-base Slider on Jalium.UI.Controls.Primitives.RangeBase (which already exists) so OnValueChanged/OnMinimumChanged/OnMaximumChanged become real overrides. |
| SoundPlayerAction | Source | `public Uri? Source { get; set; }  // plain auto-property, not DP-backed` | `public System.Uri Source { get; set; }  // DependencyProperty-backed (SourceProperty)` | kind-mismatch | Back Source with a SourceProperty DependencyProperty so it participates in binding/animation/styling; currently it is a plain CLR auto-property. |
| SpellCheck | GetCustomDictionaries | `public static IList<Uri>? GetCustomDictionaries(DependencyObject element)` | `public static System.Collections.IList GetCustomDictionaries(System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.TextBoxBase textBoxBase)` | param-type | WPF param is TextBoxBase and return is non-generic System.Collections.IList; Jalium widens param to DependencyObject and returns IList<Uri>?. Align both for strict parity. |
| SpellCheck | GetIsEnabled | `public static bool GetIsEnabled(DependencyObject element)` | `public static bool GetIsEnabled(System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.TextBoxBase textBoxBase)` | param-type | WPF element parameter is TextBoxBase vs DependencyObject in Jalium (source-compatible widening). |
| SpellCheck | SetIsEnabled | `public static void SetIsEnabled(DependencyObject element, bool value)` | `public static void SetIsEnabled(System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.TextBoxBase textBoxBase, bool value)` | param-type | First parameter is TextBoxBase in WPF vs DependencyObject in Jalium. |
| SpellCheck | SetSpellingReform | `public static void SetSpellingReform(DependencyObject element, SpellingReform value)` | `public static void SetSpellingReform(System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.TextBoxBase textBoxBase, System.Windows.Controls.SpellingReform value)` | param-type | First parameter is TextBoxBase in WPF vs DependencyObject in Jalium. |
| SpellingError | Suggestions | `public IReadOnlyList<string> Suggestions { get; }` | `public System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> Suggestions { get; }` | return-type | WPF exposes Suggestions as IEnumerable<string>; Jalium narrows to IReadOnlyList<string> (source-compatible for enumeration, but declared type differs). |
| TabControl | SelectedContent | `public object? SelectedContent { get; set; }` | `public object SelectedContent { get; }` | accessibility | WPF exposes SelectedContent read-only (private setter). Make the Jalium setter non-public. |
| TextBlock | FontFamily | `public string FontFamily { get; set; }` | `public System.Windows.Media.FontFamily FontFamily { get; set; }` | return-type | WPF FontFamily is Media.FontFamily; Jalium models it as a string family name. A FontFamily-typed property/DP is needed for parity. |

| InputMethod | InputMethod(type) | `public static class InputMethod` | `public partial class InputMethod : DispatcherObject (instance; per-dispatcher static Current)` | kind-mismatch | WPF InputMethod is an instance class (DispatcherObject) exposing per-thread instance IME state; Jalium made it a static utility, so DependencyProperty backing and all instance IME state properties cannot exist as-is. Reshape to an instance class. |
| InputMethod | Current | `public static IInputElement? Current { get; }` | `public static System.Windows.Input.InputMethod Current { get; }` | return-type | WPF Current returns the InputMethod singleton for the thread; Jalium repurposed Current to return the IME target element (semantic + type mismatch). |
| InputMethod | GetInputScope | `public static InputScope GetInputScope(IInputElement element)` | `public static System.Windows.Input.InputScope GetInputScope(System.Windows.DependencyObject target)` | param-type | WPF attached accessor takes DependencyObject; Jalium takes IInputElement (and uses ConditionalWeakTable, not a DP). |
| InputMethod | SetInputScope | `public static void SetInputScope(IInputElement element, InputScope value)` | `public static void SetInputScope(System.Windows.DependencyObject target, System.Windows.Input.InputScope value)` | param-type | WPF accessor takes DependencyObject. |
| InputMethod | GetIsInputMethodEnabled | `public static bool GetIsInputMethodEnabled(IInputElement element)` | `public static bool GetIsInputMethodEnabled(System.Windows.DependencyObject target)` | param-type | WPF accessor takes DependencyObject. |
| InputMethod | SetIsInputMethodEnabled | `public static void SetIsInputMethodEnabled(IInputElement element, bool value)` | `public static void SetIsInputMethodEnabled(System.Windows.DependencyObject target, bool value)` | param-type | WPF accessor takes DependencyObject. |
| InputMethod | GetPreferredImeState | `public static InputMethodState GetPreferredImeState(IInputElement element)` | `public static System.Windows.Input.InputMethodState GetPreferredImeState(System.Windows.DependencyObject target)` | param-type | WPF accessor takes DependencyObject. |
| InputMethod | SetPreferredImeState | `public static void SetPreferredImeState(IInputElement element, InputMethodState value)` | `public static void SetPreferredImeState(System.Windows.DependencyObject target, System.Windows.Input.InputMethodState value)` | param-type | WPF accessor takes DependencyObject. |
| InputMethodState | Off | `Off = 2` | `Off = 0` | default-value | Reorder members so Off=0, On=1, DoNotCare=2 to match WPF (critical: default(InputMethodState) must be Off, but Jalium yields DoNotCare). |
| InputMethodState | DoNotCare | `DoNotCare = 0` | `DoNotCare = 2` | default-value | Reorder members so Off=0, On=1, DoNotCare=2 to match WPF. |
| InputScope | RegularExpression | `public Collection<InputScopePhrase> RegularExpression { get; }` | `public string RegularExpression { get; set; }` | return-type | BUG-level divergence: WPF RegularExpression is a settable string; Jalium declared it as a read-only Collection<InputScopePhrase>. Change to 'public string RegularExpression { get; set; }'. |
| InputScope | Names | `public Collection<InputScopeName> Names { get; }` | `public System.Collections.IList Names { get; }` | return-type | WPF declares IList (minor; Collection<T> implements IList). |
| InputScope | PhraseList | `public Collection<InputScopePhrase> PhraseList { get; }` | `public System.Collections.IList PhraseList { get; }` | return-type | WPF declares IList (minor; Collection<T> implements IList). |
| InputScopeName | InputScopeName(type) | `public sealed class InputScopeName (no IAddChild)` | `public partial class InputScopeName : System.Windows.Markup.IAddChild` | kind-mismatch | Implement IAddChild (interface exists in Jalium) and add AddChild/AddText; also un-seal to match WPF. |
| InputScopePhrase | InputScopePhrase(type) | `public sealed class InputScopePhrase (no IAddChild)` | `public partial class InputScopePhrase : System.Windows.Markup.IAddChild` | kind-mismatch | Implement IAddChild and add AddChild/AddText; un-seal to match WPF. |

| KeyBinding | KeyBinding(.ctor) | `public KeyBinding(ICommand command, int key, int modifiers)` | `public KeyBinding(System.Windows.Input.ICommand command, System.Windows.Input.Key key, System.Windows.Input.ModifierKeys modifiers)` | param-type | Type key/modifiers as the Key and ModifierKeys enums (both exist in Jalium) rather than int. |
| KeyBinding | Key | `public int Key { get; set; }` | `public System.Windows.Input.Key Key { get; set; }` | return-type | Use the Key enum type. |
| KeyBinding | Modifiers | `public int Modifiers { get; set; }` | `public System.Windows.Input.ModifierKeys Modifiers { get; set; }` | return-type | Use the ModifierKeys enum type. |
| KeyBinding | KeyBinding(type) | `public sealed class KeyBinding : InputBinding (plain class)` | `public partial class KeyBinding : InputBinding (Freezable chain)` | kind-mismatch | WPF InputBinding derives from Freezable/DependencyObject; Jalium's InputBinding is a plain non-sealed class. Without a Freezable base, KeyProperty/ModifiersProperty DPs and CreateInstanceCore override cannot exist. Also un-seal KeyBinding. |
| KeyEventArgs | InvokeEventHandler | `internal override void InvokeEventHandler(Delegate handler, object target)` | `protected override void InvokeEventHandler(System.Delegate genericHandler, object genericTarget)` | accessibility | WPF protected; Jalium internal (rooted in RoutedEventArgs). |
| KeyGesture | KeyGesture(Key) | `public KeyGesture(int key)` | `public KeyGesture(System.Windows.Input.Key key)` | param-type | Type key parameter as Input.Key enum. |
| KeyGesture | KeyGesture(Key,ModifierKeys) | `public KeyGesture(int key, int modifiers)` | `public KeyGesture(System.Windows.Input.Key key, System.Windows.Input.ModifierKeys modifiers)` | param-type | Use Key and ModifierKeys enums. |
| KeyGesture | KeyGesture(Key,ModifierKeys,string) | `public KeyGesture(int key, int modifiers, string displayString)` | `public KeyGesture(System.Windows.Input.Key key, System.Windows.Input.ModifierKeys modifiers, string displayString)` | param-type | Use Key and ModifierKeys enums. |
| KeyGesture | Key | `public int Key { get; }` | `public System.Windows.Input.Key Key { get; }` | return-type | Expose Key as Input.Key enum. |
| KeyGesture | Modifiers | `public int Modifiers { get; }` | `public System.Windows.Input.ModifierKeys Modifiers { get; }` | return-type | Expose Modifiers as ModifierKeys enum. |
| KeyGesture | GetDisplayStringForCulture | `public string GetDisplayStringForCulture(IFormatProvider? culture)` | `public string GetDisplayStringForCulture(System.Globalization.CultureInfo culture)` | param-type | Accept CultureInfo instead of IFormatProvider?. |
| KeyStates | KeyStates (underlying type) | `[Flags] public enum KeyStates (underlying int)` | `[Flags] public enum KeyStates : byte` | kind-mismatch | Declare the underlying type as byte: 'public enum KeyStates : byte' to match WPF's public contract. |
| KeyboardDevice | FocusedElement | `public UIElement? FocusedElement { get; internal set; }` | `public System.Windows.IInputElement FocusedElement { get; }` | return-type | Return IInputElement instead of UIElement? to match WPF. |
| KeyboardFocusChangedEventArgs | (base class) | `sealed class KeyboardFocusChangedEventArgs : RoutedEventArgs` | `class KeyboardFocusChangedEventArgs : System.Windows.Input.KeyboardEventArgs` | kind-mismatch | WPF: KeyboardEventArgs->InputEventArgs->RoutedEventArgs; Jalium derives straight from RoutedEventArgs and is sealed. Insert missing layers and unseal. |
| KeyboardFocusChangedEventHandler | KeyboardFocusChangedEventHandler | `namespace Jalium.UI` | `namespace System.Windows.Input (=> Jalium.UI.Input)` | accessibility | Move the delegate from Jalium.UI (IInputElement.cs) into Jalium.UI.Input to match the mapped namespace; every other Input delegate lives in Jalium.UI.Input. |
| KeyboardNavigation | KeyboardNavigation (type declaration) | `public static class KeyboardNavigation` | `public sealed partial class KeyboardNavigation { internal KeyboardNavigation() { } }` | static | WPF declares KeyboardNavigation as a NON-static sealed class with an internal parameterless constructor; Jalium declares it as a `static` class. A static class cannot be used as a generic type argument or variable/field type. For strict type-shape parity change to `public sealed class KeyboardNavigation` with an internal (or private) parameterless ctor. Low practical impact since only static attached-property members are used, but it is a genuine type-shape divergence. |
| KeyboardNavigationMode | KeyboardNavigationMode.Once | `Once = 2 (implicit ordinal; declared 3rd)` | `Once = 1` | default-value | Reorder Jalium members to Continue, Once, Cycle, None, Contained, Local (or assign explicit = values) so Once == 1 as in WPF. |
| KeyboardNavigationMode | KeyboardNavigationMode.Cycle | `Cycle = 1 (implicit ordinal; declared 2nd)` | `Cycle = 2` | default-value | Reorder/assign explicit values so Cycle == 2 as in WPF. |
| KeyboardNavigationMode | KeyboardNavigationMode.None | `None = 5 (implicit ordinal; declared 6th/last)` | `None = 3` | default-value | Reorder/assign explicit values so None == 3 as in WPF. |
| KeyboardNavigationMode | KeyboardNavigationMode.Contained | `Contained = 3 (implicit ordinal; declared 4th)` | `Contained = 4` | default-value | Reorder/assign explicit values so Contained == 4 as in WPF. |
| KeyboardNavigationMode | KeyboardNavigationMode.Local | `Local = 4 (implicit ordinal; declared 5th)` | `Local = 5` | default-value | Reorder/assign explicit values so Local == 5 as in WPF. |

| ManipulationBoundaryFeedbackEventArgs | InvokeEventHandler | `internal override void InvokeEventHandler(Delegate handler, object target)` | `protected override void InvokeEventHandler(System.Delegate genericHandler, object genericTarget)` | accessibility | WPF protected; Jalium internal. |
| ManipulationCompletedEventArgs | ManipulationContainer | `public UIElement? ManipulationContainer { get; init; }` | `public System.Windows.IInputElement ManipulationContainer { get; }` | return-type | Type as IInputElement. |

| ManipulationDeltaEventArgs | ManipulationContainer | `public UIElement? ManipulationContainer { get; init; }` | `public System.Windows.IInputElement ManipulationContainer { get; }` | return-type | Type as IInputElement. |
| ManipulationDeltaEventArgs | Cancel | `public void Cancel()` | `public bool Cancel()` | return-type | Return bool. |
| ManipulationDeltaEventArgs | InvokeEventHandler | `internal override void InvokeEventHandler(Delegate handler, object target)` | `protected override void InvokeEventHandler(System.Delegate genericHandler, object genericTarget)` | accessibility | WPF protected; Jalium internal. |
| ManipulationInertiaStartingEventArgs | ManipulationContainer | `public UIElement? ManipulationContainer { get; init; }` | `public System.Windows.IInputElement ManipulationContainer { get; }` | return-type | Type as IInputElement. |
| ManipulationInertiaStartingEventArgs | ManipulationOrigin | `public Point ManipulationOrigin { get; init; }` | `public System.Windows.Point ManipulationOrigin { get; set; }` | accessibility | WPF is get;set; (settable post-construction); Jalium init-only prevents handlers re-targeting the inertia origin. |
| ManipulationInertiaStartingEventArgs | Cancel | `public void Cancel()` | `public bool Cancel()` | return-type | Return bool. |

| XmlnsDictionary | IsFixedSize | `bool System.Collections.IDictionary.IsFixedSize { get; }  (explicit interface impl)` | `public bool IsFixedSize { get; }` | accessibility | Expose IsFixedSize as a public class member so callers can read it without casting to IDictionary. |

| XmlnsDictionary | Values | `public System.Collections.Generic.ICollection<string> Values { get; }` | `public System.Collections.ICollection Values { get; }` | return-type | WPF's public Values returns non-generic ICollection; Jalium's returns ICollection<string>. |
| XmlnsDictionary | Remove(string) | `public bool Remove(string key)` | `public void Remove(string prefix)` | return-type | WPF Remove(string) returns void; Jalium returns bool. Align return type. |

| BitmapCacheBrush | Opacity | `public new double Opacity { get; set; } = 1.0;` | `(inherited from Brush.Opacity; not redeclared on BitmapCacheBrush)` | kind-mismatch | Remove the shadowing 'new double Opacity'; inherit Brush.Opacity as WPF does (the 'new' member splits storage from the base Opacity). |
| BitmapScalingMode | BitmapScalingMode.Linear | `Linear = 4` | `Linear = 1` | default-value | In WPF Linear is an alias of LowQuality (both = 1). Redeclare as 'Linear = LowQuality' (=1) so BitmapScalingMode.Linear == BitmapScalingMode.LowQuality as in WPF. |
| BitmapScalingMode | BitmapScalingMode.Fant | `Fant = 5` | `Fant = 2` | default-value | In WPF Fant is an alias of HighQuality (both = 2). Redeclare as 'Fant = HighQuality' (=2). |

| DrawingCollection | GetEnumerator | `public List<Drawing>.Enumerator GetEnumerator() (inherited)` | `public System.Windows.Media.DrawingCollection.Enumerator GetEnumerator()` | return-type | WPF returns a dedicated DrawingCollection.Enumerator struct. |

AdjustedFaceNames { get; set; }` | `public System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<System.Windows.Markup.XmlLanguage, string> AdjustedFaceNames { get; }` | return-type | Key type should be XmlLanguage and the property should be get-only. |

| FontEmbeddingRight | FontEmbeddingRight.PreviewAndPrint | `PreviewAndPrint = 8` | `PreviewAndPrint = 5` | default-value | Match WPF numeric ordering (PreviewAndPrint block = 5..8). |

| FontEmbeddingRight | FontEmbeddingRight.PreviewAndPrintButWithBitmapsOnly | `PreviewAndPrintButWithBitmapsOnly = 10` | `PreviewAndPrintButWithBitmapsOnly = 7` | default-value | Match WPF numeric ordering. |
| FontEmbeddingRight | FontEmbeddingRight.PreviewAndPrintButNoSubsettingAndWithBitmapsOnly | `PreviewAndPrintButNoSubsettingAndWithBitmapsOnly = 11` | `PreviewAndPrintButNoSubsettingAndWithBitmapsOnly = 8` | default-value | Match WPF numeric ordering. |
| FontEmbeddingRight | FontEmbeddingRight.Editable | `Editable = 4` | `Editable = 9` | default-value | Match WPF numeric ordering (Editable block = 9..12). |
| FontEmbeddingRight | FontEmbeddingRight.EditableButNoSubsetting | `EditableButNoSubsetting = 5` | `EditableButNoSubsetting = 10` | default-value | Match WPF numeric ordering. |
| FontEmbeddingRight | FontEmbeddingRight.EditableButWithBitmapsOnly | `EditableButWithBitmapsOnly = 6` | `EditableButWithBitmapsOnly = 11` | default-value | Match WPF numeric ordering. |
| FontEmbeddingRight | FontEmbeddingRight.EditableButNoSubsettingAndWithBitmapsOnly | `EditableButNoSubsettingAndWithBitmapsOnly = 7` | `EditableButNoSubsettingAndWithBitmapsOnly = 12` | default-value | Match WPF numeric ordering. |

| FontFamily | LineSpacing | `public double LineSpacing { get; init; }` | `public double LineSpacing { get; set; }` | accessibility | Change the init-only accessor to a full 'set' to match WPF's mutable LineSpacing. |
| FormattedText | Baseline | `public double Baseline { get; set; }` | `public double Baseline { get; }` | accessibility | WPF Baseline is read-only (computed). Jalium exposes a public setter; acceptable but note the semantic (Jalium is a lightweight measurement DTO, not a rich text object). |
| FormattedText | Height | `public double Height { get; set; }` | `public double Height { get; }` | accessibility | WPF Height is read-only; Jalium adds a setter. |

| CompositionTarget | CompositionTarget | `public static partial class CompositionTarget` | `public abstract partial class CompositionTarget : System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherObject, System.IDisposable` | kind-mismatch | WPF's CompositionTarget is an ABSTRACT per-render-target INSTANCE type (base of HwndTarget etc.) carrying RootVisual/TransformToDevice/TransformFromDevice/Dispose. Jalium repurposed the name as a STATIC central frame-timer/clock. A static class cannot host the instance render-target API; true parity needs a separate abstract CompositionTarget instance type (in Jalium.UI.Media). |

FileOk` | `public event System.ComponentModel.CancelEventHandler FileOk` | param-type | Change the event delegate to System.ComponentModel.CancelEventHandler and raise it with a CancelEventArgs (WPF's OnItemOk(CancelEventArgs)) so subscribers can veto the OK. | IsOffscreenBehavior | IsOffscreenBehavior.Onscreen | `Onscreen = 2 (declared 3rd, after Offscreen; no explicit value)` | `Onscreen = 1` | default-value | Enum members are declared as Default, Offscreen, Onscreen, FromClip so Onscreen implicitly = 2. WPF has Onscreen = 1. Reorder so Onscreen precedes Offscreen (Default, Onscreen, Offscreen, FromClip) or assign explicit values to match WPF ordinals. |
| IsOffscreenBehavior | IsOffscreenBehavior.Offscreen | `Offscreen = 1 (declared 2nd, before Onscreen; no explicit value)` | `Offscreen = 2` | default-value | Jalium declares Offscreen before Onscreen so Offscreen implicitly = 1. WPF has Offscreen = 2. Swap the declaration order of Onscreen/Offscreen (or assign explicit values) so Onscreen=1 and Offscreen=2 as in WPF. |
| AutomationPeer | ListenerExists | `public static bool ListenerExists()` | `public static bool ListenerExists(System.Windows.Automation.Peers.AutomationEvents eventId)` | param-count | Add the AutomationEvents eventId parameter so callers can query per-event listener state as in WPF. |
| AutomationPeer | GetPattern | `public object? GetPattern(System.Windows.Automation.Peers.PatternInterface patternInterface)  // concrete, delegates to non-WPF GetPatternCore` | `public abstract object GetPattern(System.Windows.Automation.Peers.PatternInterface patternInterface)` | kind-mismatch | WPF declares GetPattern abstract (subclasses override GetPattern directly; there is no GetPatternCore). Jalium instead makes GetPattern concrete and routes through a non-WPF protected virtual GetPatternCore. Caller-compatible, but the extensibility contract differs from WPF. |

Make protected once the class is abstract. |

SelectorAutomationPeer base type does not exist in Jalium. |

| ItemsControlAutomationPeer | ItemsControlAutomationPeer (class) | `public sealed class ItemsControlAutomationPeer : FrameworkElementAutomationPeer` | `public abstract partial class ItemsControlAutomationPeer : FrameworkElementAutomationPeer, IItemContainerProvider` | kind-mismatch | WPF type is an abstract base (with abstract CreateItemAutomationPeer) that all items-control peers derive from; Jalium's is a sealed concrete peer with no item-peer factory. | WritingCompletedEventArgs | .ctor | `public WritingCompletedEventArgs(System.Exception? error, bool cancelled)` | `public WritingCompletedEventArgs(bool cancelled, object state, System.Exception exception)` | param-count | Change ctor to (bool cancelled, object state, System.Exception exception) forwarding to base(exception, cancelled, state); Jalium is missing the object state/UserState parameter and has the args in reversed order. |
| WritingPrintTicketRequiredEventArgs | .ctor | `public WritingPrintTicketRequiredEventArgs(Jalium.UI.Controls.Printing.PrintTicketLevel level, int sequence)` | `public WritingPrintTicketRequiredEventArgs(System.Windows.Xps.Serialization.PrintTicketLevel printTicketLevel, int sequence)` | param-type | Param 1 uses Jalium's local PrintTicketLevel enum (Job/Document/Page) instead of WPF System.Windows.Xps.Serialization.PrintTicketLevel (None/FixedDocumentSequencePrintTicket/FixedDocumentPrintTicket/FixedPagePrintTicket) - a different enum with different values. |
| WritingProgressChangedEventArgs | WritingProgressChangedEventArgs | `public sealed class WritingProgressChangedEventArgs : System.EventArgs` | `public class WritingProgressChangedEventArgs : System.ComponentModel.ProgressChangedEventArgs` | kind-mismatch | Derive from System.ComponentModel.ProgressChangedEventArgs (provides ProgressPercentage + UserState) instead of EventArgs, and remove 'sealed'. |

AttributeChanged` | `public event System.Windows.Ink.PropertyDataChangedEventHandler AttributeChanged` | param-type | Change the event delegate to PropertyDataChangedEventHandler and raise with PropertyDataChangedEventArgs (requires the missing PropertyDataChangedEventArgs type). StrokesChanged` | `public event System.Windows.Ink.StrokeCollectionChangedEventHandler StrokesChanged` | param-type | Introduce a StrokeCollectionChangedEventHandler delegate and type the event with it to match WPF instead of EventHandler<StrokeCollectionChangedEventArgs>. |
| StrokeCollection | OnStrokesChanged | `private void OnStrokesChanged(Jalium.UI.Controls.Ink.StrokeCollectionChangedEventArgs e)` | `protected virtual void OnStrokesChanged(System.Windows.Ink.StrokeCollectionChangedEventArgs e)` | accessibility | Make OnStrokesChanged protected virtual so subclasses can override the raiser (also requires the class to be unsealed). |

| StylusTip | StylusTip.Rectangle | `Rectangle = 1` | `Rectangle = 0` | default-value | Reorder the enum so Rectangle is declared first (value 0) and Ellipse second (value 1) to match WPF's underlying numeric values. | StylusTip | StylusTip.Ellipse | `Ellipse = 0` | `Ellipse = 1` | default-value | Companion to Rectangle: values are swapped relative to WPF. Make Ellipse = 1 (declare after Rectangle). |

| StylusPlugIn | IsActiveForInput | `protected virtual bool IsActiveForInput(RawStylusInput rawStylusInput)` | `public bool IsActiveForInput { get; }` | kind-mismatch | Expose IsActiveForInput as a public read-only bool property per WPF.
